source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the circuit in <image>, the initial voltage across the capacitor is \(10 \, V\), with the switch being open. The switch is then closed at \(t = 0\). The total energy dissipated in the ideal Zener diode (\(V_Z = 5 \, V\)) after the switch is closed (in mJ, rounded off to three decimal places) is ______
